mediapackage.packagingconfiguration.dash.Description: Determines the position of some tags in the Media Presentation Description (MPD). When set to **FULL**, elements like `SegmentTemplate` and `ContentProtection` are included in each `Representation`. When set to **COMPACT**, duplicate elements are combined and presented at the AdaptationSet level.
A short string that's appended to the end of the endpoint URL to create a unique path to this packaging configuration.
Minimum amount of content (measured in seconds) that a player must keep available in the buffer.
The DASH profile type. When set to **HBBTV_1_5**, the content is compliant with HbbTV 1.5.
Limitations for outputs from the endpoint, based on the video bitrate.
